scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @nomic/core && npm run build --workspace @nomic/cli && npm run build --workspace @nomic/vscode-extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @nomic/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @nomic/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace @nomic/vscode-extension
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @nomic/vscode-extension && npm run clean --workspace @nomic/cli && npm run clean --workspace @nomic/core
